reasoning: PKGBUILD follows standard AppImage packaging practices: uses official upstream CDN with pinned checksum, no unsafe top-level code execution, and all operations are confined to standard build/package functions.
disagreement_analysis: Disagreement caused by makepkg --nobuild failures preventing source download for deepseek/qwen models, while Claude-Sonnet succeeded
coverage_issues: Deepseek/Qwen failed to review any files due to source download failure
All models skipped analysis of AppImage binary content
learnings: Improve robustness of source download step with retries or fallback mirrors
Prioritize PKGBUILD and .install files over binaries when time/resources limited
Develop capability to analyze AppImage contents for suspicious payloads
Implement better error handling for network-dependent steps
Enhance model prompts to clarify that skipped downloads don't imply package risk
